title: ApprovalBackendPostureSelection
description: Typed broker-projected detail describing reduced-assurance backend posture selection semantics.

target_backend_kind.description: Backend kind selected by this approval request.

selection_mode.description: Selection posture mode for backend request.

change_kind.description: Backend posture change kind bound to action identity.

requested_posture.description: Requested posture label from the signed approval request details payload.

assurance_change_kind.description: Typed assurance delta for the requested backend posture change.

opt_in_kind.description: Typed opt-in posture for backend selection trust semantics.

reduced_assurance_acknowledged.description: Whether the user explicitly acknowledged reduced assurance before requesting container mode.
